message:
feat(type-inference): Apply dict-aware widening to all variable assignments

- Add widenDictAwareLegacy() in statements.zig for legacy mode (when
  TypeInferrer is null)
- Update legacy assignment widening to use dict-aware logic
- Update kwarg widening in inferrer.zig to use widenDictAware()

This ensures dict widening is applied consistently across:
- Scoped variable assignments (widenScopedVar -> widenDictAware)
- Legacy mode assignments (widenDictAwareLegacy)
- Function kwarg tracking

All 6 tests pass: bool, int_literal, unary, longexp, binop, float
